description: Composition Blue round neck t-shirt made of polyester fabric, that has a ribbed neckline, light blue raglan sleeves with white piping details, team badge on the left chest, fifa badge on the left sleeve and towards the right hemline and country name printed on the upper back   FittingRegularWash careMachine was coldWash separatelyDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachLine dryDo not ironDo not dry clean Support the Argentinian football team on and off the soccer field in this fifa team jersey. The raglan sleeves and the snug Fit of the tee lends to it's sleek styling while the FIFA badges inspire you to score some goals of your own. Team this with jeans and sneakers for casual outings or team it with tracks and  cleats for a football session of your own. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5"
